ideation: This animation sequence will depict a gentle, swaying motion, evocative of a shamrock gently moving in a breeze. The arms will mimic this movement, creating a sense of calm and natural rhythm.  The left arm will move slightly more prominently than the right, creating a subtle asymmetry that adds to the natural feel. I'll use the robot's two-joint system to create expressive movements, referencing existing examples for guidance on joint angles and fluidity. Frame 1: Both arms start in a relaxed position at the side. Frame 2: The left arm gently moves outward and upward, while the right arm remains mostly still. Frame 3: The left arm begins to return to its starting position, while the right arm now moves slightly outward and upward. Frame 4: Both arms return to their starting position. This cyclical motion will create a gentle swaying effect, emphasizing the soft and peaceful nature of the shamrock.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, like a gentle breeze
the left arm sways outward and up, a soft unfurling
the right arm answers, a subtle mirroring sway
both arms settle back to rest, calm and still
